class.name: TestRaycastTo2D
class.brief_description: A query test that casts a ray or shape from the [QueryItem2D] to a [QueryContext2D], to check if it hits.
class.description: A query test that casts a ray or shape from the [QueryItem2D] to a [QueryContext2D], to check if it hits.

members.member: On [param true], invert the casting and start from [member context] into [QueryItem2D].
The physics layers this test will detect.
The target [QueryContext2D] that will be detected.
What collision objects will be excluded from the test. Usually the querier should be excluded.
What type of collision object this test will detect.
